about.title: Why does this project exist?
about.slogan: My mission is to put the power of AI in the hands of people, not just corporations. Intelligent tools to empower your talent.
about.p1: jobi hunting is exhausting. Every posting seems to want a different cover letter, a different tone, a different pitch. And often the barrier isn't your experience — it's not knowing how to present it.
about.p2: jobi Assistant was born from that frustration. It's an open source, free, no-signup, no-data-stored tool — built so that anyone, anywhere in the world, can apply for a jobi with the same confidence as someone who has a mentor or an HR team behind them.
about.p3: Just paste your CV and the jobi description. The AI does the rest: a LinkedIn message, a short pitch, and a full cover letter — all tailored to that specific jobi, in the language of the posting.
about.opensource.desc: Fork it, modify it, improve it. It's yours.
about.private.desc: Nothing is stored. Your API key goes directly to Groq — never through any of my servers.
about.free.desc: No subscriptions, no artificial limits, no ads.
footer.forall: Built so everyone can apply with confidence.
